findings.notes: Semantic HTML hierarchy: h1 > h2 > h3 correctly structured on all pages. Role attributes applied to non-semantic containers.
No orientation lock applied. Mobile views work in both portrait and landscape.
Status information conveyed with color + text label (e.g., badge text 'NORMAL' + green background). SVG map uses color + dotted-line pattern for detour differentiation.
All font sizes use CSS clamp() with rem units. Text scales from 200% zoom without horizontal scrolling.
Mobile-first CSS. .grid-3 collapses to 1-column below 768px. Fan and Volunteer views are 420px max-width with flexible padding.
All badge elements use explicitly set color: #ffffff on OKLCH-defined colored backgrounds. Contrast ratios computed at >= 4.5:1.
All interactive elements are native button or anchor tags. Tab order follows DOM order. Focus outlines defined via :focus-visible in globals.css.
Root layout provides title 'MatchMind — FIFA World Cup 2026 Operations'. Each page exports per-route metadata.
All navigation links have descriptive text or aria-label (e.g., 'Back to launcher', 'Exit fan app').

Root <html lang='en'>. Fan page Arabic content is wrapped with direction:rtl. Note: for full compliance with dynamic language switching, <html lang> should be updated dynamically — currently acceptable for demo scope.
Arabic text is rendered in the correct visual direction. Dynamic lang attribute switching is not implemented at the document level. This is a known acceptable limitation for the demo scope.

Role='switch' + aria-checked on accessibility toggle. Role='meter' + aria-valuenow on ConfidenceBar. Role='alert' + aria-live='assertive' on fan detour box. Role='log' + aria-live='polite' on operator logs.
All dynamically updated panels use aria-live (polite or assertive as appropriate). Loading states use role='status' with aria-label.

font_choice.rationale: Purpose-built for low-vision users. Distinguishes commonly confused characters (1/l, 0/O, rn/m).
font_choice.loading: via next/font/google with display:swap — no FOIT

arabic_rtl.implementation: direction: rtl applied to wrapper div when language === 'ar'

wheelchair_routing.implementation: Inline SVG routing map with conditional accessible elevator marker
wheelchair_routing.detour_behavior: On incident: SVG switches to green bold detour path + red dashed blocked path with bilingual 'Safe Detour' label

touch_targets.minimum_size: 48px height on all buttons (WCAG 2.5.5 / Apple HIG)
touch_targets.gap_between_targets: >= 8px (enforced via gap CSS property in flex/grid containers)

reduced_motion.implementation: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) disables .alert-pulse animation and all transition durations

a11y_report.overall_score: WCAG 2.1 AA — Compliant (1 known partial on 3.1.2 dynamic lang attribute)
